zh.lifeSummary: 當Anschetil de Bulmer於大約1070年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Alan de Bulmer32歲，母親Joan de Powther17歲。他於1099年與Sybilia Humez在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1114年被列為high sheriff of yorkshire。他去世於1129年在英國諾圖波藍德利丁米爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾布爾莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anschetil de Bulmer于大约1070年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Alan de Bulmer32岁，母亲Joan de Powther17岁。他于1099年与Sybilia Humez在英国英格兰達勒姆布朗加斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1114年被列为high sheriff of yorkshire。他去世于1129年在英国諾圖波藍德利丁米爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾布爾莫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Anschetil de Bulmer was born about 1070, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Alan de Bulmer, was 32 and his mother, Joan de Powther, was 17. He married Sybilia Humez in 1099, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1114, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of yorkshire. He died in 1129, in Ridingmill, Northumberland, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Bulmer, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anschetil de Bulmer est né environ 1070, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Bulmer, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan de Powther, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Sybilia Humez en 1099, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1114, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of yorkshire. Il est décédé en 1129, à Ridingmill, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Bulmer, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bulmer, Yorkshire, England: Bulmer, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anschetil de Bulmer um 1070 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Bulmer 32 und seine Mutter Joan de Powther 17. Er hat 1099 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom Sybilia Humez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1114 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff of yorkshire aufgeführt. Er starb 1129 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Ridingmill, Northumberland, England und wurde in Bulmer, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anschetil de Bulmer è nato il circa 1070 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Alan de Bulmer, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Powther, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Sybilia Humez nel 1099, nel Brancepeth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1114, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of yorkshire. Morì nel 1129, nel Ridingmill, Northumberland, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Bulmer, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anschetil de Bulmerが約1070年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alan de Bulmerは32歳，母Joan de Powtherは17歳であった。1099年にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスでSybilia Humezと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1114年，職業はhigh sheriff of yorkshireと記録されている。彼は1129年にイギリスノースウンバーランドリディングミルで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアブルマーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anschetil de Bulmer(이)가 대략 1070년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Bulmer(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Powther(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1099년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 Sybilia Humez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1114년, 그의 직업은 high sheriff of yorkshire이었다. 그는 1129년 영국 노르스벌랜드 리딩미에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 버머에 묻혔다.

pt.Bulmer, Yorkshire, England: Bulmer, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anschetil de Bulmer nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Bulmer, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Powther, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybilia Humez em 1099, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1114, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of yorkshire. Ele faleceu em 1129, em Ridingmill, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Bulmer, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Bulmer, Yorkshire, England: Bulmer, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anschetil de Bulmer родился около 1070 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan de Bulmer было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Powther, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybilia Humez в 1099 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1114 году он работал по профессии high sheriff of yorkshire. Он умер в 1129 г. в местности ридингмилл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности булмир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Bulmer, Yorkshire, England: Bulmer, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anschetil de Bulmer nació aproximadamente 1070, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Bulmer, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan de Powther, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sybilia Humez en 1099, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. En 1114, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of yorkshire. Murió en 1129, en Ridingmill, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Bulmer, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
